Subchapter M & Safety Risk Auditor

Regulatory compliance for maritime assets goes far beyond simply having a red canister on the wall. This advanced tool evaluates your vessel against the intricacies of 46 CFR Subchapter M, NFPA 10, and modern emerging hazards like Lithium-Ion battery banks.

Deep-Scan Audit Capabilities:

  • Vessel Profiling Calculates requirements via BHP, Tonnage, and Length matrices.
  • Special Hazards Adjusts for high-risk zones like commercial galleys (Class K) and Lithium-Ion storage (Class D).
  • Maintenance Tracking Identifies non-compliant inspection intervals and expiring alarm panel batteries.
